{{Quote|I have a personal message to deliver to you, one which I'd rather not put on even an encrypted channel. Unfortunately, one of the line directors at Coruscant Space Control feels that I shouldn't be permitted to land.|Talon Karrde to Leia Organa Solo|<ref name="SpecPast" />}}
'''Coruscant Space Traffic Control''', also called '''Coruscant Space Control''', was the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] government agency charged with controlling all [[Realspace/Legends|space]] traffic that traveled to and from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Line directors would supervise various entry points and either clear or deny the [[Starship/Legends|starships]] from entering or leaving the planet. Line directors would be identified by a bureaucratic operating number.<ref name="SpecPast" />

In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], a line director identified as [[KTR-44875]] attempted to prevent [[Talon Karrde]] from entering Coruscant. However, Karrade contacted Counselor [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] for help. She then called Coruscant Space Control and gave instructions for Karrade to be let through.<ref name="SpecPast" />
